description: The Gambino crime family is an Italian American Mafia crime family and one of the Five Families that dominate organized crime in New York City. Founded around 1900 by Vincent Mangano, it became the most powerful American Mafia family under Carlo Gambino. Its activities include racketeering, gambling, loansharking, extortion, and murder. The family has been led by several bosses, including John Gotti, and remains active.

country_links.evidence_quote: In 1970, he was accused by police of establishing a heroin pipeline in the city of Toronto with Paolo Violi, Rocco Zito and Vincenzo Cotroni.
country_links.context: The Gambino family established a heroin pipeline in Toronto.

country_links.evidence_quote: Silesi allegedly oversaw the Gambino family interests in Havana, Cuba for Gambino family boss Albert Anastasia during the 1950s.
country_links.context: The Gambino family oversaw interests in Havana, Cuba.

country_links.evidence_quote: shipping 500 kg of pure cocaine from Guyana in South America to the port of Gioia Tauro in Calabria
country_links.context: The Gambino family sourced cocaine from Guyana for a transatlantic drug shipment.

country_links.evidence_quote: FBI and Italian police arrested 17 members and associates of the 'ndrangheta Mafia... and 7 members and associates of the Gambino and Bonanno families... organizing a transatlantic drug ring with the aim of shipping 500 kg of pure cocaine from Guyana in South America to the port of Gioia Tauro in Calabria.
country_links.context: The Gambino family was involved in a transatlantic drug ring with Italian mafia groups, shipping cocaine from Guyana to Italy.

country_links.evidence_quote: Thomas Gambino... was one of 15 suspected members of the Inzerillo crime family arrested in coordinated raids in Sicily and the United States.
country_links.context: The Gambino family had members arrested in Sicily and was involved with the Inzerillo crime family there.

country_links.evidence_quote: the Gambino family had 23 active crews operating in New York City, New Jersey, Long Island, South Florida, and Connecticut.
country_links.context: The Gambino crime family operates in New York City, New Jersey, Long Island, South Florida, and Connecticut, with crews and activities across multiple states.
